description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow has three jobs: mad_atter, alice, and mad_atter-dev, each running on ubuntu-20.04 with a couchbase service. Each job checks out the repository, sets up ruby 2.7, installs dependencies with bundle install, initializes couchbase, compiles an extension with rake compile, checks couchbase, and runs tests with rake test. The jobs also configure core dump capturing and display core dumps on failure.
